title: stelis philargyrus
intro: Stelis philargyrus, also known as the "hairy stelis" or "hairy lip orchid", is a type of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis philargyrus include treating various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Stelis philargyrus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used externally to apply to affected areas or internally to treat various health conditions.
